one_time_description: Loss due to vendor insolvency recorded in operations
economic_notes: First Nation has investments in Thunder Development Limited Partnership (99%), Thunder Development Ltd (100%), and TFN Investment Corp. Thunder Development LP reported net loss of $1,793,693 for the year. First Nation operates oil and gas, retail fuel and confectionery sales on reserve, and land lease revenues.
notes: Financial statements are for fiscal year ended March 31, 2020, audited April 12, 2021. The document header says 'year ended March 31, 2020' but the cover page encoding was garbled. Auditor signed from Prince Albert, Saskatchewan. Consolidated entities include Thunderchild CMHC Housing, Thunder Oil Ltd., Thunderchild First Nation Gas & Convenience Store, and Moonlight Bay Gas and Convenience Store (inactive). Modified equity entities include Thunder Development Limited Partnership (99%), Thunder Development Inc., and TFN Investment Corp. Thunderchild 1905 Surrender Trust and Thunderchild Treaty Land Entitlement Trust are excluded. Large loss from investment in First Nation partnerships and business entities of $31,254,651 (prior year $1,347,083) distorts operations significantly. Budget approved April 19, 2019. FNFA holds 4% deposit on loans of $1,357,014.
